text: the 'memo' trap is the real killer here
everyone wraps everything in useMemo because they think it makes it faster by default
it actually adds overhead if the calculation is cheap
the amount of code i've seen where people memoize a string concatenation is honestly depressing
idk i still think it's safer to just memoize by default? prevents re-renders down the line
that's how you get memory leaks and bloated bundles
profile first, optimize second. premature optimization is the root of all evil and all that
does anyone actually use the react profiler though
only when everything is burning down
